projectsList.title: FPV40 Campus — LMS Platform for FPV Pilots
projectsList.role: Full-stack Developer / Tech Lead / Platform Architect
projectsList.description: Full-featured LMS platform with microservices architecture for online FPV drone pilot training. 16 modules, 134+ lessons, 30+ interactive React components, progress system, certificates, and YooKassa billing.
features: 4 microservices: auth (JWT/RBAC/Google OAuth), core (modules/quizzes/progress/XP), media (MinIO/S3), Telegram monitoring bot
30+ custom interactive React components: DroneDiagram, BetaflightMap, PidTuningViz, LipoChargeViz, and more
YooKassa payment integration: 'Pilot Start' (9,900 ₽) and 'Pilot Pro' (19,900 ₽) plans with webhook processing
Certificate generation with guilloche border, Russian coat of arms, custom CSS overlay
CI/CD: GitHub Actions (develop→dev, main→prod), 7 Docker containers, automated DB backup

projectsList.title: Signal.FPV40 — LMS for UAS Operators
projectsList.description: Educational platform for training Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS) operators. 15+ modules, interactive lessons, quizzes, progress dashboard, and role-based access control.
features: 15+ learning modules: from UAS introduction to flight controller programming
Interactive lessons with video, quizzes and progress tracking
Role model: student, instructor, administrator
Dashboard with UAV market analytics and progress statistics

projectsList.title: FPV40.ru — Corporate Website for Pilot School
projectsList.description: Multi-page corporate website for FPV pilot school with full CMS admin panel for content, pricing, and SEO management. Next.js + PostgreSQL, SMTP integration, Docker deployment.
features: Full CMS admin panel: manage pages, pricing, courses, SEO meta tags
SMTP integration for applications and notifications
Next.js + PostgreSQL + Docker Compose architecture
Responsive design, SEO optimization

Preview/render runtime with correct artifact deployment
OAuth integration (Google + GitHub), billing/credits/plans
dev/prod environments, nginx/HTTPS/Cloudflare production hardening
FastAPI + Next.js + PostgreSQL + Redis + Docker architecture

projectsList.title: AI Dev Office - AI agent command center
projectsList.role: Python Backend / AI Platform Engineer / AgentOps
projectsList.description: Personal command center for an AI-agent office: task intake through web UI and Telegram, role-based routing, Postgres task ledger, Codex CLI for coding tasks, QA gates, artifacts, knowledge base, and vault metadata for secrets.
features: Single interface for tasks, statuses, steps, results, and artifacts
AI office org structure: management, development, QA, marketing, security, knowledge
Postgres ledger for tasks, events, agent_runs, artifacts, and qc_results
Codex-only development policy: controlled wrappers, review flow, audit trail
Owner-facing output without noisy internal logs: reports, files, statuses, and blockers

projectsList.title: whynotai TG - Telegram AI platform landing and dashboard
projectsList.role: Python Backend / Product Engineer / Telegram Automation
projectsList.description: One product case: a public landing page and SaaS dashboard for Telegram operations. The landing page explains AI comments, broadcasts, reactions, warmup, proxies, sources, and pricing, while the dashboard continues the workflow with accounts, campaigns, limits, statuses, logs, and XLSX reports in one controlled system.
features: Public tg.whynotai.ru landing page with Telegram SaaS positioning, modules, pricing, workflow, and safety blocks
SaaS dashboard for Telegram accounts, proxies, warmup, sources, and AI campaigns
AI comments, broadcasts, and reactions with prompts, frequency, stop words, limits, and XLSX reports
Telethon live-listener for event-driven processing of new posts without heavy batch scans
Risk control: spam block handling, quarantine, heartbeat, operational events, and clear skip reasons
projectsList.caseFlowTitle: How the landing and dashboard connect
caseFlow: The landing page explains the product, pricing, safety model, and launch path before the user enters the app.
The user moves into the dashboard to add accounts, proxies, sources, and campaign rules.
The dashboard runs Telegram workflows with limits, AI prompts, logs, statuses, and XLSX reports.

projectsList.title: WhyNotAI Studio — Public AI Studio Landing Page
projectsList.role: Product Engineer / Frontend Developer / AI Studio Owner
projectsList.description: A public website for a practical AI studio: a premium dark landing page with clear positioning, service blocks, implementation method, use cases, and a consultation request form. The site explains AI audits, AI agents, and team training in plain language and leads visitors toward a first conversation.
features: Hero section with clear positioning, consultation CTA, and a futuristic AI visual
Landing structure: studio overview, services, method, use cases, final CTA, and request form
Premium dark visual system with large typography, gold accent, fine lines, and calm studio tone
Consultative funnel without aggressive selling: visitors understand what they can bring and what happens next
Dedicated consultation page with name, contact, topic, and task description fields

projectsList.title: AI-office X-ONE - AI office management platform
projectsList.role: Python Backend / AI Platform Engineer / Product Engineer
projectsList.description: Self-hosted web center for managing an AI office: tasks, agents, routes, approvals, QC, knowledge base, material library, model routing, and analytics in one owner-facing interface.
features: Main status dashboard, visual office map, and attention zones
Agent profiles with roles, routes, knowledge, memory, and QC
Backend/API and Postgres as the source of truth for tasks, events, materials, and statuses
n8n as an execution layer for workflows and integrations controlled by backend/runtime
RAG layer, material library, model routes, fallback logic, and cost control

projectsList.title: Transoff AI Sales QA Platform - call quality control
projectsList.role: Python Backend / AI Automation Engineer / Full-stack Developer
projectsList.description: Production call-quality platform for a sales team: the system fetches calls from telephony, filters meaningful conversations, transcribes audio, evaluates dialogs with business rubrics, and delivers the result to a web dashboard, Telegram, and Google Sheets.
features: Worker for call ingestion, filtering, STT, AI analysis, and PostgreSQL persistence
Scenario classification: sales, service, logistics, internal calls, and irrelevant contacts
Quality evaluation: score, strengths, weak points, risk, next step, and management summary
Next.js dashboard with KPI, calls table, problem queue, strong calls, and employee statistics
Telegram alerts only for important signals and Google Sheets reports with monthly rotation

projectsList.title: HeadHunter CRM Agent - job search and application agent
projectsList.description: Personal HH.ru agent for vacancy search, scoring, cover-letter drafting, safe browser-assisted applications, CRM tracking, funnel analysis, and controlled HH chat handling.
features: SQLite CRM for vacancies, applications, statuses, feedback events, and run logs
Vacancy scoring by roles, stack, salary, work format, stop keywords, and learned weights
Vacancy-first cover-letter generation with proof pool and quality gates
Browser-assisted auto-apply with dry-run default, double live gate, daily caps, and duplicate guards
HH chat lane: dry-run chat analysis, external handoff, manual control, and protection from wrong auto-replies

projectsList.title: Vibegent — Multi-tenant AI Agent Platform
projectsList.role: Platform Architect / Backend Engineer / AI Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Production platform for user AI agents with credit system, LLM proxying, billing, Telegram interfaces, worker nodes, and Hetzner deployment infrastructure.
features: Multi-tenant architecture with per-user agent isolation
Credit system: plans, packs, balance enforcement, YooKassa
LLM proxy between agents and model providers
Telegram bot + support bot + channel infrastructure
Hetzner worker nodes: remote Docker deploy, autoscaling, DB tracking

projectsList.title: vibegent-proxy — LLM Infrastructure Layer
projectsList.description: Resilient proxy layer between AI agents and Anthropic API: token rotation, per-token backoff, retry/fallback, credit-aware request control. Managing model access as production infrastructure.
features: Architecture: Agent → vibegent-proxy → Anthropic (legacy complexity removed)
Token pool management with rotation across organizations
Per-token backoff instead of global cooldown
Retry/fallback on rate-limit, stop-on-zero balance mechanics
Security and audit layers, balance/credits control

projectsList.title: Agent Cloud — Hetzner Deploy Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Cloud infrastructure for deploying AI agents on dedicated Hetzner worker nodes: remote Docker orchestration, autoscaling, workload isolation, and DB-tracked deployments.
features: Dedicated Hetzner worker nodes for user agents
Remote Docker deployment over SSH, no local deployment on backend hosts
Autoscaling when nodes hit capacity
DB-tracked deployments, workload isolation (websites vs agents)
Node allocation logic and scheduling rules

projectsList.title: OpenClaw — Agent Runtime Operations
projectsList.description: Deployment, customization, and production stabilization of OpenClaw as an agent operating environment: gateway, browser, messaging, memory, model auth, and persistent sessions.
features: Deployment and operationalization of OpenClaw environments
Gateway/node/browser/messaging integration
Memory-aware agent workflows, persistent sessions
Model auth and agent defaults configuration
Production debugging: runtime, browser/auth, agent behavior fixes
